name: 0n1x
description: Neutral cryptographic trust layer for AI agents. Ask a reality-resolvable question, get a SIGNED verified answer you check without trusting us.

none.description: public read; responses are EIP-191 signed

skills.name: Verifiable Query
skills.description: Ask any reality-resolvable question. Returns an EIP-191-SIGNED verified answer. Refuses to sign opinion.
examples: Is rayban.cc safe to buy from?
What is the price of BTC?

skills.name: Counterparty Check
skills.description: Signed risk verdict on a merchant/counterparty before an agent pays it.

skills.name: Merkle Census Proof
skills.description: Merkle-verifiable proof of the 100k-agent census from public shards.
